metrics.name: stackra.rbac.resolver.check_total
metrics.description: source: cache_hit / db_resolved / deny_grant / allow_grant / delegation / default_deny. outcome: allow / deny.

metrics.name: stackra.rbac.resolver.duration_us
metrics.description: PermissionResolver::resolve() latency. cache_hit P99 target < 1ms; db_resolved P99 target < 20ms.

metrics.name: stackra.rbac.cache.hit_ratio
metrics.description: Rolling 5-minute cache hit ratio across the resolver. Alert threshold <0.9 (cache thrashing indicates broken invalidation OR a stampede).

metrics.name: stackra.rbac.cache.invalidations_total
metrics.description: trigger: role_change / permission_change / assignment_change / bulk / broadcast.

metrics.name: stackra.rbac.cache.keys_purged
metrics.description: How many cache keys purged per invalidation trigger. Feeds a 'invalidation blast radius' dashboard.

metrics.name: stackra.rbac.roles.total
metrics.description: Live count of roles per (guard, is_system) tuple.

metrics.name: stackra.rbac.assignments.total
metrics.description: Live count of active model_has_roles rows. is_time_bounded: expires_at IS NOT NULL.

metrics.name: stackra.rbac.guard_mismatch_total
metrics.description: Cross-guard write refusals. Alert threshold >0 in prod.

metrics.name: stackra.rbac.application_mismatch_total
metrics.description: Cross-Application write refusals. Alert threshold >0 in prod.

metrics.name: stackra.rbac.custom_role_slot_usage
metrics.description: Aggregate: (sum of tenants' custom role counts / sum of tenants' custom_role_slot caps). Feeds the 'tenants approaching quota' dashboard.

metrics.name: stackra.rbac.role_definitions.drift
metrics.description: direction: 'added' | 'removed_from_catalogue'. Drift between data/role-catalogue.json and role_definitions rows. Emitted by ReconcileRoleDefinitionsJob.
